pr.title: [Non-record]: JEPA v2 —JEPA v2 — Why same-sequence next-k JEPA collapses in causal LMs

output.summary: JEPA v2 speeds EMA, uses multi-step offsets with per-microstep targets, and adds bigram embeddings plus int6 compression to keep JEPA useful.
techniques: Multi-step JEPA offsets (1/2/4/8) plus 0.9 EMA to avoid collapse
Per-microstep target encoder runs and BigramHash embeddings free attention representations
Int6 quantization with LZMA keeps weights within the artifact budget
